title: Cover
description: Family Office Wealth OS — Sovereign Wealth. Private by Design.

title: The Problem
description: Wealth without order is wealth at risk — scattered institutions, no unified view, no privacy.

title: The Solution
description: One sovereign platform for your entire wealth — local-first, AI-powered, multi-entity.

title: Privacy & Security
description: Your data never leaves your control — local-first, zero knowledge, end-to-end encrypted.

title: AI Intelligence
description: Insights that anticipate, not just report — AI engine for risk, cash flow, and opportunity.

title: Complete Platform
description: Everything in one place — Assets, Ledger, Vault, Entities, Dashboard.

title: Live Data
description: $4.7M total net worth tracked across three entities, ten asset classes, and fifteen accounts.

title: Entities & Legacy
description: Structure built for generations — trusts, LLCs, individuals managed together.

title: Who It's For
description: UHNW individuals, family offices, and post-liquidity founders.

title: Take Control
description: Sovereign. Private. Intelligent. Take control of your wealth on your terms.
